evidence_spans.span: 我贴了三段历史回复，想确认之前有没有过度套方法；请只按文本证据检查，不要先启动新的方法判断。

abstain_reason: Prior repair history is not supplied in the conversation text; the mention of three historical replies alone is insufficient evidence of repeated local repairs, same means type, recurrence, or an N+1 repair request.
